subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-05-22
subcodes.first_line: I found the Jews very crestfallen today, because on slight excuses the government has exiled eight of their prominent leaders. The new rigorous laws of naturalization wear heavily on them.
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @literal interpretation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies
